hero.headline: Your home, *spotless* — every corner, every time
hero.subheadline: We move your things back exactly where they belong. Because the details matter as much as the clean.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every room, every surface, every detail
services_section.subheading: From baseboards to ceiling fans, we clean what others miss

services.title: Deep House Cleaning
services.description: Every surface scrubbed, every corner reached. We move furniture and put everything back exactly where it belongs.

services.title: Regular Maintenance
services.description: Weekly or bi-weekly cleaning that keeps your home consistently spotless. Same team, same attention to detail.

services.title: Move-In/Move-Out
services.description: Complete top-to-bottom cleaning for your fresh start. Every inch cleaned before you settle in or hand over keys.

services.title: Post-Construction
services.description: Dust, debris, and contractor mess completely removed. Your renovation reveal, properly cleaned.

about.heading: Bridgeport's detail-obsessed cleaning team
about.body: We're the Bridgeport cleaning service that puts your coffee mug back on the exact same coaster. Every detail matters.

reviews.name: Ken H.
reviews.text: Bruna and her team did a fantastic job cleaning my house. Very friendly and worked efficiently but carefully. Would definitely recommend them.

reviews.name: Mariel A.
reviews.text: Exceptional service. They come at a convenient time so I can go to work and leave them. When I come home, my house is immaculate and my dogs are smiling.

reviews.name: Abiba J.
reviews.text: Very satisfied with the services. Very thorough and best yet she returns all of my things to their proper place. My OCD could not take it if she didn't.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Bridgeport and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Same attention to detail, every neighborhood

cta.heading: Ready for a spotless home?
cta.body: Free quotes, same-day response, and the kind of cleaning that makes you smile when you walk in the door.
